help: Symbolic name of the detector plugin to use (e.g. 'insightface').
Plugin-specific settings live in a separate config file:
source_extensions:  File extensions eligible for face detection.
source_priority:    Ordered glob patterns for master files.
First match wins. Uses fnmatch syntax.
path:  Path to SQLite database (null = next to config file).
min_samples:  Minimum faces to form a cluster.
